prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年该科类最低位次分别为约5108名→4768名→4196名→6060名→6628名，整体呈先升后降趋势。2021–2023年位次逐年前移（从5108提升至4196），但2024 年江西省高考改革首年实行"3+1+2"模式后，位次大幅后移至6060名，2025年进一步后移至6628名，近两年累计后移约2432名，显示竞争格局发生明显变化。2025年基准位次约662 8名；该校在江西省理科/物理类招生计划：2021–2023年均为97人，2024年增至106人，2025年增至109人，2026年进一步扩招至131人，较2025年增加 22人，扩招幅度约20.2%。扩招意味着投放名额增多，在考生规模不变或小幅增长的情况下，会降低录取门槛，推动最低位次数字后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 西安电子科技大学为211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第39名，近年稳定在38–41名区间，属于国内顶尖理工类院校，在电子信息领域享有极高声誉；2022年高考 周期内该校曾出现学术不端事件（两名学生被留校察看），评价偏负面；2025年周期内涉及校园安全事件（学生遭遇冷暴力与霸凌），评价偏负面。但整体舆情影响有限，未出现 大规模投档异常或断档记录。抖音热度评级为"较热"，综合热度排名第60位，短视频平台曝光度中等偏上，反映报考关注度尚可；第五轮学科评估中，信息与通 信工程、电子科学与技术获评A+，计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全获评A，机械工程获评A-，共5个A类学科。这些王牌专业与该校在赣招生专业高度吻合（计算机类、电子信息 类等），对高分考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 2024–2025年专业热度数据显示，计算机类、电子信息/通信均为"高热推荐"或"推荐"级别，电气工程及其自动化亦为 "高热推荐"，相关专业社会关注度持续走高。江西省2026年普通高考总人数约47.49万，较2025年略有增加；按近年物理类占比约56.4%估算，2026年物理类考生约26.78万人，较2 025年26.64万人小幅增长约1400人，竞争略有加剧。；该校位于陕西省西安市，非江西省本地高校。2025年该校在江西省招 生占比约3.3%（20人/全国598人），属于跨省招生，无显著地域偏好影响。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2024–2025年位次持续后移趋势、2026年大幅扩招约20.2%以及江西省考生总数小 幅增长，扩招是推动位次后移的最主要因素；但该校电子信息、计算机等王牌专业社会热度持续高涨，对高分考生吸引力强，会部分抵消扩招带来的门槛下降效应。在2025年基准 6628名基础上，经供需弹性计算并考虑专业热度修正，预测2026年最低位次约7401名，区间6901–7901名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（创新实验班）（网络空间安全（实验班）、人工智能（图灵班））
- 电子信息类（卓越计划实验班）（通信工程（卓越班）、电子信息工程（卓越班）、集成电路设计与集成系统（卓越班））
- 电子信息类（创新实验班）（通信工程（创新班）、电子信息工程（创新班）、微电子科学与工程（创新班））
- 电子信息类（集成电路）（微电子科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 电子信息类（通信）（通信工程、信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）
- 计算机类（智能）（智能科学与技术、人工智能）
- 电子信息类（电子工程）（电子信息工程、信息对抗技术、电磁场与无线技术）
- 计算机类（计算机科学与技术、软件工程）
- 计算机类（网络安全）（信息安全、网络空间安全）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 电子信息类（电子科学、信息物理、空天信息）（电子科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术、空间科学与技术、探测制导与控制技术、遥感科学与技术）
- 自动化类（智能制造及智能测控）（机械设计制造及其自动化、工业设计、自动化、电气工程及其自动化、测控技术与仪器、电子封装技术、机器人工程）
- 生物医学工程类（电子信息交叉融合班）（生物医学工程、智能医学工程）
- 管理科学与工程类（数字化与商务智能融合培养）（信息管理与信息系统、工业工程、大数据管理与应用）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6901–7901名内，建议以二档专业为主攻方向（电子信息类通信方向、计算机类智能方向等），一档王牌专业（创新实验班、卓越计划实验班）可作为冲刺目标， 三档专业（自动化类、管理科学与工程类）作为稳妥保底。该校电子信息与计算机学科实力顶尖（A+级），社会热度持续高涨，报考时建议优先考虑与优势学科强相关的专业方向 。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 5108 → 4768 → 4196 → 6060 → 6628, showing an overall trend of first rising then falling. Rankings moved forward year by year from 2021 to 2023 (from 5108 to 4196), but after the first year of Jiangxi's college entrance examination reform implementing the "3+1+2" model in 2024, rankings significantly shifted backward to 6060, and further to 6628 in 2025, with a cumulative backward shift of about 2432 positions over the past two years, indicating a clear change in the competitive landscape. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 6628. Enrollment plans for this university in Jiangxi's science/physics category: 97 students each year from 2021 to 2023, increased to 106 in 2024, 109 in 2025, and further expanded to 131 in 2026, an increase of 22 students compared to 2025, with an expansion rate of about 20.2%. Expansion means more slots are available, which, under stable or slightly growing candidate numbers, will lower admission thresholds and push the minimum ranking number backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Xidian University is a Project 211 and Double First-Class construction university; it ranks approximately 39th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 38–41 range in recent years, belonging to the top-tier science and engineering institutions in China, with a very high reputation in the field of electronic information. During the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced an academic misconduct incident (two students were placed on academic probation), with negative evaluations. During the 2025 cycle, a campus safety incident occurred (students encountered cold violence and bullying), also with negative evaluations. However, the overall impact of public opinion is limited, with no records of large-scale abnormal filing or gaps. The Douyin heat rating is "relatively hot," with a comprehensive heat ranking of 60th, indicating medium-to-high exposure on short video platforms, reflecting moderate attention from applicants. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Information and Communication Engineering and Electronic Science and Technology were rated A+, Computer Science and Technology and Cyberspace Security were rated A, and Mechanical Engineering was rated A-, totaling five A-class disciplines. These flagship programs are highly consistent with the majors recruited in Jiangxi (Computer Class, Electronic Information Class, etc.), strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Data on major popularity from 2024–2025 shows that Computer Class, Electronic Information/Communication are both "highly recommended" or "recommended," and Electrical Engineering and Automation is also "highly recommended," with social attention to related majors continuing to rise. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Jiangxi Province general college entrance examination is approximately 474,900, slightly higher than in 2025; based on the recent physics category proportion of about 56.4%, the estimated number of physics category candidates in 2026 is about 267,800, a small increase of about 1,400 from 2025's 266,400, indicating slightly intensified competition. The university is located in Xi'an, Shaanxi Province, not a local university in Jiangxi. In 2025, the university's enrollment proportion in Jiangxi was about 3.3% (20 students out of 598 nationwide), belonging to cross-provincial enrollment, with no significant geographical preference effect.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous backward shift trend in rankings from 2024–2025, the significant expansion of about 20.2% in 2026, and the small increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi Province, expansion is the main factor driving the ranking backward. However, the high social popularity of the university's flagship programs such as Electronic Information and Computer Science strongly attracts high-scoring candidates, partially offsetting the threshold-lowering effect of expansion. Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 6628, after supply-demand elasticity calculation and considering major popularity adjustments, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is approximately 7401, with a range of 6901–7901.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:

- Computer Class (Innovation Experimental Class) (Cyberspace Security (Experimental Class), Artificial Intelligence (Turing Class))
- Electronic Information Class (Excellence Plan Experimental Class) (Communication Engineering (Excellence Class), Electronic Information Engineering (Excellence Class), Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System (Excellence Class))
- Electronic Information Class (Innovation Experimental Class) (Communication Engineering (Innovation Class), Electronic Information Engineering (Innovation Class), Microelectronics Science and Engineering (Innovation Class))
- Electronic Information Class (Integrated Circuits) (Microelectronics Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated System).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electronic Information Class (Communication) (Communication Engineering, Information Engineering, Spatial Information and Digital Technology)
- Computer Class (Intelligence) (Intelligent Science and Technology, Artificial Intelligence)
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Engineering) (Electronic Information Engineering, Information Countermeasure Technology, Electromagnetic Field and Wireless Technology)
- Computer Class (Computer Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Computer Class (Network Security) (Information Security, Cyberspace Security).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Electronic Information Class (Electronic Science, Information Physics, Aerospace Information) (Electronic Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Space Science and Technology, Detection Guidance and Control Technology, Remote Sensing Science and Technology)
- Automation Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Intelligent Measurement and Control) (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Industrial Design, Automation, Electrical Engineering and Automation, Measurement and Control Technology and Instruments, Electronic Packaging Technology, Robot Engineering)
- Biomedical Engineering Class (Electronic Information Cross-Fusion Class) (Biomedical Engineering, Intelligent Medical Engineering)
- Management Science and Engineering Class (Digital and Business Intelligence Integrated Training) (Information Management and Information Systems, Industrial Engineering, Big Data Management and Application).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 6901–7901, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Electronic Information Class Communication direction, Computer Class Intelligence direction, etc.) as the main direction, Tier 1 flagship programs (Innovation Experimental Class, Excellence Plan Experimental Class) as sprint targets, and Tier 3 majors (Automation Class, Management Science and Engineering Class) as safe backups. The university's Electronic Information and Computer Science disciplines are top-notch (A+ level), with continuously high social popularity. When applying, it is advisable to prioritize major directions strongly related to the advantageous disciplines.
